name: Nick Sahf
title: Licensed Massage Therapist
bio: Nick Sahf is a Licensed Massage Therapist with over six years of experience helping clients reduce pain, improve mobility, and feel their best through personalized therapeutic bodywork.

Specializing in neuromuscular therapy, sports massage, craniosacral therapy, and Esalen®-inspired massage, Nick takes a customized approach to every session based on each client’s unique needs and goals.

As a former gymnast and active grappling practitioner, Nick brings a deep understanding of movement, recovery, and athletic performance to his work. His mission is simple: to help clients move better, feel better, and live better.
